evals.prompt: Generate a @DataJpaTest for CountryEORepository.findAllCountries using SQL fixtures that insert 14 countries. The project already has BaseRepositoryTest.
evals.expected_output: An integration test class extending BaseRepositoryTest with @DirtiesContext and assertions that verify the row count and at least one concrete country value.

evals.prompt: Create repository integration tests for InventoryEORepository.findLowStockItems using fixture SQL that inserts products, warehouses, and low-stock inventory rows.
evals.expected_output: A DataJpaTest that validates the query result size and key LowStockDTO fields based on fixture data.
